title: vitis mexicana
intro: Vitis mexicana, also known as the Mexican grapevine or Mexican wild grape, is a species of grapevine native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vitis mexicana include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in herbal infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
